should_trigger.input: Triage these review comments and decide what to accept
should_trigger.reason: Direct accept/defer/reject triage request — primary use case

should_trigger.input: Sort these PR findings into what to fix, what to defer, and what to ignore
should_trigger.reason: Explicit sorting of review findings by acceptance decision

should_trigger.input: Which of these AI review comments should I actually act on?
should_trigger.reason: Asks for acceptance decisions on review findings

should_not_trigger.reason: Finding issues is review-changes; this Skill triages already-found issues

should_not_trigger.input: Write comment text for these findings
should_not_trigger.reason: Formatting findings as comments is draft-review-comments

should_not_trigger.input: Implement the fixes for these accepted findings
should_not_trigger.reason: Implementation after acceptance decisions is implement-changes
